conformanceCases.description: a workspace path literal in a contents_equals expected-value position is valid
invalid: a bare string literal in a contents_equals expected-value position is rejected; contents_equals requires a FileContentsReference
invalid: a workspace path literal in a text_equals expected-value position is rejected; text_equals requires a TextValue
invalid: a fixture reference literal in a text_equals expected-value position is rejected; text_equals requires a TextValue
invalid: a workspace path literal in a dir contains entry-name position is rejected; the entry name requires a plain string literal
invalid: a bare string literal as the file checkpoint subject is rejected; the subject requires a workspace path literal
